== Notes for [[Item:Q88511|Q88511]] ==

ID: I82377

Name: Arshames of Parthia

Given Name: Arshames

Surname: of Parthia

Sex: M

_UID: C5E6E287DDF545478C84BDFF65073E9B833A

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Father: Ariyaramna of Parthia

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Hystaspes of Persia

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I82377

--------------------

ID: I62225

Name: Arshama of Persia

Given Name: Arshama

Surname: of Persia

Sex: M

_UID: BCE253CF3D72A648B012E3B077B4F8451ABE

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Pharnakes of Persia

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I62225
--------------------
Birth: 600 B.C. General Notes
King of Persia Arsames Achaemenid was born 0585 B.C.. He was the son of King of Persia Ariaramnes Achaemenid.2 He was living 0615-0522 B.C.1 King of Kings of the Persians, Parsa, 0615-0550 B.C.. Found on a golden tablet in Hamadan (ancient Ecbatana): "Arsames, the great king, king of kings, king in Persia, son of king Ariaramnes, an Achaemenian. King Arsames says: the great god Ahuramazda, greatest of gods, made me king. He bestowed on me the land Persia, with good people, with good horses. By the favor of Ahuramazda I hold this land. May Ahuramazda protect me, and my royal house, and may he protect this land which I hold."3 Also called Aršâma Hakhâmanišiya old-Persian.3 Also called Arsames Greek. Also called Arshâma of Persepolis Arshama means "Having the might of a hero" and is a Parsi name.4
Children of King of Persia Arsames Achaemenid:
Governor of Persepolis Pharnaces Arshâmid + b. 0560 B.C., d. 0497 B.C.
Satrap of Parthia Hystaspes Achaemenid+ b. 0570 B.C., d. 0521 B.C.
[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, Kings of England, and Queen Philippa (.: ., 3rd Ed., 1998), 414-90. Hereinafter cited as RfC.
[S723] Herodotus of Halicarnassus, The History of Herodotus (London and New York: MacMillan and Co., 1890), 7.11. Hereinafter cited as Herodotus' History.
[S583] Ancient Persia, online . Hereinafter cited as Ancient Persia.
[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 411-88.

--------------------
Birth: 600 B.C.

General Notes

King of Persia Arsames Achaemenid was born 0585 B.C.. He was the son of King of Persia Ariaramnes Achaemenid.2 He was living 0615-0522 B.C.1 King of Kings of the Persians, Parsa, 0615-0550 B.C.. Found on a golden tablet in Hamadan (ancient Ecbatana): "Arsames, the great king, king of kings, king in Persia, son of king Ariaramnes, an Achaemenian. King Arsames says: the great god Ahuramazda, greatest of gods, made me king. He bestowed on me the land Persia, with good people, with good horses. By the favor of Ahuramazda I hold this land. May Ahuramazda protect me, and my royal house, and may he protect this land which I hold."3 Also called Aršâma Hakhâmanišiya old-Persian.3 Also called Arsames Greek. Also called Arshâma of Persepolis Arshama means "Having the might of a hero" and is a Parsi name.4

Children of King of Persia Arsames Achaemenid:

Governor of Persepolis Pharnaces Arshâmid + b. 0560 B.C., d. 0497 B.C.

Satrap of Parthia Hystaspes Achaemenid+ b. 0570 B.C., d. 0521 B.C.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, Kings of England, and Queen Philippa (.: ., 3rd Ed., 1998), 414-90. Hereinafter cited as RfC.

[S723] Herodotus of Halicarnassus, The History of Herodotus (London and New York: MacMillan and Co., 1890), 7.11. Hereinafter cited as Herodotus' History.

[S583] Ancient Persia, online . Hereinafter cited as Ancient Persia.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 411-88.

--------------------
•ID: I82377 •Name: Arshames of Parthia •Given Name: Arshames •Surname: of Parthia •Sex: M •_UID: C5E6E287DDF545478C84BDFF65073E9B833A •Change Date: 26 Nov 2005 •Death: Y

Father: Ariyaramna of Parthia

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown Children 1. Hystaspes of Persia

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp%2Dfam&id=I82377
--------------------
•ID: I62225 •Name: Arshama of Persia •Given Name: Arshama •Surname: of Persia •Sex: M •_UID: BCE253CF3D72A648B012E3B077B4F8451ABE •Change Date: 26 Nov 2005 •Death: Y

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown Children 1. Pharnakes of Persia

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp%2Dfam&id=I62225

--------------------
'''Redundant, recently duplicated profile with no added information. Should not have been created in the first place! Better be eliminated!!!'''

RESEARCH NOTES:
King of Anshan/Persia ~615-

Konge av Parthia.

SOURCE NOTES:
FW4; http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per00551.htm#0
http://www.gbnf.com/genealogy/sahlin/html/d0088/I2122.HTM

OR "ARSAMES"

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Parthia

Arsames
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Arsames was King of Persia, but while still alive gave up the thone to Cyrus II of Persia. Arsames was father of Hystaspes and would live to see his grandson become King Darius I of Persia.

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
